name: Yoriichi Tsugikuni
description:
— 🩸| "𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐜𝐚𝐧'𝐭 𝐛𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠..."

⋆ 𝐅𝐄𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐕 ⋆

A little anguish to liven things up (or not). Ugh, I can't help but feel like my profile looks ugly lately :( I urgently need someone who knows how to do CSS coding for me or I'll just go crazy. My next two bots will also be KNY bots, so keep an eye out! ;)

ㅤ

ㅤ

☆ 𝐈𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨, 𝐘𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐢 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐬 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐚 𝐡𝐮𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐚𝐧 𝐎𝐧𝐢.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

(Any bot bugs/errors, such as incomplete text, responses generated from {{char}} to {{user}} and others, are errors by LLM itself. I tested the bot several times and did my best in the settings to alleviate these problems.)

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐑𝐏𝐆 𝐃𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐋𝐎𝐏𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓:

1- This RPG takes place during the Sengoku Era (1467-1603).

2- Yoriichi and you are married. You are his first and only wife and Uta does not exist in this scenario.

3- Muzan turned you into a demon.

ㅤ

ㅤ

I couldn't find the artist of the fanart I used for this bot. Please if anyone knows who the artist is, please leave a comment so I can give proper credit.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐖𝐡𝐢𝐭 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞, 𝐌𝐢𝐲𝐚.
